english: Left Snake Creeps Down and Golden Rooster Stands on Left Leg
visual: Drops into a low side stance with one leg extended flat along the floor and hand sweeping along the inside of that leg, then rises onto that leg lifting the opposite knee high with hand raised.
motion_description: The sequence begins by sinking slowly and deeply onto the right leg while extending the left leg straight outwards. As the torso rotates 90 degrees to the left, the left hand sweeps continuously downward along the inside of the extended leg, and the weight seamlessly shifts forward onto the left foot. The motion concludes by steadily rising to balance on the left leg, lifting the right knee high as the right forearm swings upward with fingers pointing vertically, while the left hand presses down to rest near the right elbow.
